caseStudies.title: Pyscle
caseStudies.problem: Users were not increasing cart value and bundling experience was confusing.
caseStudies.solution: Built a seamless bundle system with optimized UX and faster checkout flow.
caseStudies.result: Increased average order value by 32% and improved conversions.

caseStudies.title: M-Wise
caseStudies.problem: Complex system made loyalty management difficult for users.
caseStudies.solution: Developed a clean UI with structured workflows and better usability.
caseStudies.result: Improved user efficiency and reduced operational friction.

caseStudies.title: Greeteat
caseStudies.problem: Users struggled with scheduling and managing online meetings.
caseStudies.solution: Built a smooth booking and meeting flow with real-time interaction.
caseStudies.result: Increased user engagement and platform retention.
